description: Fun, style and utility are the highlights of this grey gym bag from fastrack. The ideal companion for your workouts, this bag comes with loads of compartments and pockets to hold everything from your soiled clothes to a fresh towel. Just stuff it with all your essentials and get going. Made of nylon for enhanced durability A small pouch on the top with a drawstring to hold small articles A roomy main compartment that can be accessed by a zipper on the top or front Medium sized zippered compartments on the front and side to hold gym essentials Buttoned flap covering the side compartment Detachable single shoulder strap tht can be attached to plastic loops on the front Vertical loops on the front with a drawstring to transform the gym bag into a duffel bag Small zippered pocket on the side with brand name and logo printed on it Padded, adjustable and detachable shoulder straps that distribute weight evenly and protect the shoulders and back from injuries Long, roomy compartment at the back Branded zippers and sliders for easy use Nylon bonded thread for long life Brand name printed and embroidered at the back Size Height: 26 cmWidth: 43 cmDepth: 17 cm CareDo not machine washRub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt
